directoryservice.simplead.CreateAlias.Docs: If set to `true`, specifies an alias for a directory and assigns the alias to the directory. The alias is used to construct the access URL for the directory, such as `http://.awsapps.com`. By default, this property is set to `false`.  After an alias has been created, it cannot be deleted or reused, so this operation should only be used when absolutely necessary.

directoryservice.simplead.EnableSso.Docs: Whether to enable single sign-on for a directory. If you don't specify a value, AWS CloudFormation disables single sign-on by default.

directoryservice.simplead.Name.Docs: The fully qualified name for the directory, such as `corp.example.com`.

directoryservice.simplead.Password.Docs: The password for the directory administrator. The directory creation process creates a directory administrator account with the user name `Administrator` and this password.  If you need to change the password for the administrator account, see the [ResetUserPassword](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/directoryservice/latest/devguide/API_ResetUserPassword.html) API call in the *AWS Directory Service API Reference*.

directoryservice.simplead.ShortName.Docs: The NetBIOS name of the directory, such as `CORP`.

directoryservice.simplead.Size.Docs: The size of the directory. For valid values, see [CreateDirectory](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/directoryservice/latest/devguide/API_CreateDirectory.html) in the *AWS Directory Service API Reference*.

directoryservice.simplead.VpcSettings.Docs: A [DirectoryVpcSettings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/directoryservice/latest/devguide/API_DirectoryVpcSettings.html) object that contains additional information for the operation.
